subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen is occupied with the remembrance of the friends of God; it hath not paused, nor shall it ever pause. Blessed is he who drinketh thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی بذکر دوستان الهی مشغول آنی توقف ننموده و نمینماید طوبی لمن شرب منه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @firmness in the Covenant
